determinism.generatedStatePolicy: fixture-scoped only; generated localization reports and demo outputs remain untracked unless explicitly fixture-scoped

governance.boundary: Rust/local validates localization completeness and placeholder integrity; generation remains proposal-only; browser/Studio surfaces remain read-only or draft-only; trusted writes route through the existing review/apply/trust-gradient path
governance.claims: mechanical localization demo only; no production-ready, quality, fun, shippable, release, market, or Godot replacement/parity claim
